name: SongCounter
author: NeptuneHub
description: Counts analyzed songs as a bar chart, and uses the on_song_analyzed worker hook to show a per-run count of songs analyzed plus the full hook payload of the last analyzed song.

versions.changelog: Use the on_song_analyzed worker hook: show a per-run count of analyzed songs (reset by run_id) and the last song's full hook payload under the chart. Runs on both containers now (the hook needs the worker).
Declare the plugin as Flask-only (targets) so worker containers skip its code and matplotlib dependency.
